[This]-docs
====================================

Home
--------

**[This]** (/ðɪs/) is a dynamically-typed, multi-paradigm programming language.
It's got a focus on combining the functionality of languages like C/C++ with the readabilty of Python.
We lovingly call it "Python with Curly Braces."

It's in alpha right now, but these docs can get you actually started with making cool things.
It also has a lot of technical spiel.
These docs can be a great reference for newbies, but these also work as a reference for contributors so we contributors don't forget everything that's in this heck of a language.

.. note::

   This project and its related projects are under active development.

Contents
--------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: -1

   getting_started
   manual
